title: duguetia microphylla
intro: Duguetia microphylla, also known as the yellow berry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Duguetia microphylla include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
